examples: Roentgen discovered X - rays; Darwin found many new species on the Galapagos Islands.
If an astronaut had been on the Moon at the time, they might have received a 400 rem (Roentgen Equivalent Man) radiation dose.
The best display on the market today is IBM's Roentgen screen, a 16.3-incher with 200 pixels per inch, or 6.6 times as many as a conventional PC screen.
